creator: telxoids@gmail.com
text:
You are correct.  I discovered this after I logged the bug.  I left the bug as it still seemed to be handling it incorrectly. Was basing my variable name on the /usr/local/etc/rc.d/script name, which turns out to not be the same as the variable to be used in the rc.conf file.

If it makes sense, just close the bug.  If the preference is to keep it open that's fine too, as far as I'm concerned.
